ddls:
CREATE TABLE "game_machines" (
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gaming machine */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the game machine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game machine */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the game machine was released */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the game machine */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the machine (e.g., Arcade, Home Console) */,
  "generation" TEXT /* Generation of the console (e.g., 8-bit, 16-bit) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of release (e.g., NA, EU, JP) */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform (e.g., Arcade, NES, SNES) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date and time for the machine entry */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the detail entry */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gaming machine id */,
  "romof" TEXT /* ROM file name associated with the machine */,
  "cloneof" TEXT /* Clone of another machine if applicable */,
  "sampleof" TEXT /* Sample of another machine if applicable */,
  "is_runnable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the machine is runnable */,
  "hardware_type" TEXT /* Type of hardware (e.g., CPU, GPU, Memory) */,
  "hardware_specifications" TEXT /* Detailed specifications of the hardware */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Version of the software or firmware */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date and time for the detail entry */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the detail entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the detail entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_details_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES game_machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "display_specs" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the display specification */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gaming machine id */,
  "display_type" TEXT /* Type of display used (e.g., RASTER) */,
  "display_rotate" INTEGER /* Rotation degree of the display */,
  "display_width" INTEGER /* Width of the display in pixels */,
  "display_height" INTEGER /* Height of the display in pixels */,
  "display_orientation" TEXT /* Orientation of the display (e.g., VERTICAL, HORIZONTAL) */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Full resolution in a readable format (e.g., 1920x1080) */,
  "refresh_rate" INTEGER /* Refresh rate of the display in Hz */,
  "color_depth" INTEGER /* Color depth in bits */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date and time for the display specification */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the display specification */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the display specification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_display_specs_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES game_machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the driver entry */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gaming machine id */,
  "driver_file" TEXT /* Driver file associated with the machine */,
  "driver_status" TEXT /* Current status of the driver (e.g., INCOMPLETO, BUONO) */,
  "driver_version" TEXT /* Version of the driver */,
  "driver_release_date" TEXT /* Date the driver was released */,
  "driver_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the driver */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date and time for the driver entry */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the driver entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the driver entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES game_machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "source_files" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the source file entry */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gaming machine id */,
  "sourcefile" TEXT /* File path to the source file associated with the machine */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the source file in bytes */,
  "file_md5" TEXT /* MD5 hash of the source file for verification */,
  "file_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the source file */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date and time for the source file entry */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the source file entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the source file entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_source_files_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES game_machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Developer, Tester, Historian) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
